schema.name: ganglior.node-export
schema.doc: PpgDex PPG-derived events → Ganglior bus. t/tMs = floating wall-clock ms (UTC getters). null = unknown, never fabricated.

reserved.doc: Awaiting other fleet nodes; null until available.

time.windowNote: sdnn/rmssd are whole-record (single-site PPG); per-5-min values live in epochs[]. Directly comparable to another node’s wholeRecord SDNN/RMSSD.
time.sdnnNote: whole-record sdnn runs high on optical (SDANN/baseline-wander inflation, ~+26% vs chest ECG). sdnnIndex = mean of per-5-min SDNN (~+18%); sdnnRobust = quality-gated MEDIAN of per-5-min SDNN (~+3.5% vs ECG truth) — use sdnnRobust for cross-node SDNN comparison.

confidence.note: 0..1 per-metric confidence from measured drivers (motion→hf, posture/baseline→vlf/sdnn, coverage+correction→beat-to-beat). vlf capped 0.7 — single-site optical VLF stays baseline-wander-limited even when clean; not a defect to "fix".

timeseries.doc: 5-min epochs — primary cross-node feed (posture rides on epochs[].position).
